description: Blue Cross member asks about remaining physical therapy benefit and coverage path.
transcript:
This is Ella Brooks. I am a Blue Cross member and my ID is BCX-8822009.
I am trying to continue physical therapy and need to know if I still have covered visits left.
I do not have my date of birth in front of me if you need it.

gold.expected_next_step: Confirm PT visit limits and advise on when additional review is needed.
